notes:
Ember 1.10.2 — A brand-new Ember Search

• Ember Browser's built-in search has been completely redesigned — a polished, colourful start page with a gradient logo, a time-aware greeting, and quick-link tiles with real site icons.
• Make it yours: click the gear to open Customise — pick from 6 colour themes (Ember, Ocean, Forest, Grape, Rose, Slate) or set any custom accent, switch between Dark and Light, toggle the greeting/clock, and add or remove your own shortcut tiles. Your choices are saved and re-tint the whole browser to match.
• Redesigned results: instant-answer chips for maths, an AI answer card with one-tap Copy and clickable inline source citations, clean result cards with site icons, and quick links to search the same query on DuckDuckGo, Brave, Google, Startpage or Wikipedia.

Builds on 1.10.1's Ember Browser fullscreen fix.
